arts.ttl: Arsenal 'actively looking' to sign striker - Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says the club are "actively looking" to sign a striker in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: ‘Much higher than €25m’ – Wolves told they need off-market offer to have any chance
arts.sum: Real Betis’ Johnny Cardoso has been linked with a move to Wolverhampton Wanderers in the winter market. Saturday’s editions of ABC Sevilla and Mundo Deportivo have looked at Wolves’ chances of securing the midfielder’s services. The newspaper local to the La Liga side state Real Betis will not open the exit door for the 23-year-old The post ‘Much higher than €25m’ – Wolves told they need off-market offer to have any chance appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Wolves vs Arsenal kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. Live text coverage of Wolves vs Arsenal is also being provided on Saturday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Arsenal facing Chido Obi-Martin repeat as wonderkid, 18, is spotted at Man Utd game
arts.sum: Arsenal could wave goodbye to a promising youth prospect as Manchester United look to tempt yet another Gunners wonderkid to Old Trafford just months after signing Chido Obi-Martin

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'working on' imminent January transfer for record-breaking goalscorer
arts.sum: Arsenal are in dire need of a new forward behind the end of the January transfer window and look to be progressing in their attempts to sign a major target after a Mikel Arteta appeal

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal head to Wolves in the Premier League this weekend with three points the sole objective. The Gunners lost ground on leaders Liverpool last weekend after blowing a two-goal lead to draw with Aston Villa. arts.ttl: Arsenal risk another painful transfer reminder as Matheus Cunha looks to prove point for Wolves
arts.sum: Alexander Isak showed Arsenal what they are missing and Cunha could do the same at Molineux this afternoon

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid target Arsenal left back Oleksandr Zinchenko but face competition from German giants
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Zinchenko joined the Gunners in 2022 from Man City , and was a major boost to Mikel Arteta 's plans at the time, but has found himself falling down the packing order.
